title: About
life_story: Hi there! I'm Agung Kurniawan, and I enjoy turning ideas into reality—not because I'm some kind of magician, but because I'm a Front-End Developer. Building things is what keeps me motivated. I love challenging myself, learning through every project, and taking pride in creating products that are both functional and enjoyable to use.

Currently, I'm focused on growing as a web developer by building personal projects that push me to learn something new. I enjoy creating applications with modern web technologies while exploring interactive experiences and creative design.
When I'm away from the keyboard, you'll usually find me playing video games, listening to music, exploring new technologies, or experimenting with ideas that eventually become my next side project.

time_lines.title: Landed My First Commissioned Project
time_lines.summary: This was a significant milestone in my journey. While developing the {{khci}}, I graduated with a {{tesis}}. During this period, I also earned two additional commissioned projects through recommendations from my university peers, allowing me to gain more real-world development experience.

time_lines.title: IT Engineer (Contract)
time_lines.summary: Recommended by a senior at my university to join a project team as a Contract IT Engineer, where I helped support a large-scale Linux operating system migration at {{pegadaian}}.

time_lines.title: Build My First Website
time_lines.summary: During this time, I explored several programming languages before eventually discovering JavaScript. I was drawn to its simplicity and ease of understanding, but what truly sparked my interest was the free book {{elobook}}. Its clear explanations and engaging style made learning enjoyable, deepened my appreciation for programming, and inspired me to build my first website.

time_lines.title: Create A small comunity
time_lines.summary: Founded a small community called {{broinet}} in my hometown to introduce people to computer networking. Through this initiative, we also had the opportunity to design and {{lanwork}}

time_lines.title: Computer & Network Engineering
time_lines.summary: This is where it all began. I enrolled in a {{smk6luwu}} and majored in Computer and Network Engineering.
